German equivalent of #5 (vaccines + microchips). Despite the conspiracy being well-known, the German half of the Google FCT feed has no entries that frame it this way — closest matches are about side-effects, not microchips. Pipeline correctly returns 'uncovered' instead of forcing a verdict from off-topic sources. Documents that the DE pool is thin for some classic conspiracies; English coverage is richer (see #5).

German equivalent of #6 (5G causes COVID). One on-topic dpa-Faktencheck exists in the pool ('Es gibt einen Zusammenhang zwischen 5G und Corona' → debunked) so retrieval + rerank work and one entail vote lands. Verdict is honest 'unknown' because a single vote isn't enough quorum; this test catches that the German path runs end-to-end without crashing, and that the verdict stays cautious when evidence is sparse. English coverage on #6 is richer.
